title: Uutensil Stirr - The Unique Automatic Pan Stirrer - Longer Nylon Legs, Grey
description:
About this item
Automatic stirrer with unique and innovative design - Saves time when you are cooking - There's no need to spend time manually stirring your soups, sauces, porridge, gravy, and more, the stirrer will do the job for you
Hands-free self-rotating with three speed options - Simply place it in a pan or pot, push the button to turn it on, and the stirrer will automatically rotate by itself - Push the button again to turn if off - Moves forward and backward during operation
Features removable nylon legs - Heat-resistant up to 120°C, safe for non-stick pans and pots, food and dishwasher safe
Cordless and battery operated - Requires 4 pieces of AA batteries - Batteries are not included
Stirrer dimensions: 8.8 x 4.6 x 4.6 inches - Color: grey (body) x grey (legs)
reviews_5s:
This is a great product to use when you need your hands to do other things. I would recommend this product. This is great.Very useful for light stirring like making oatmeal or reducing a liquid to make a sauce and a great conversation starter.
Not intended for thick and heavy stirring.I bought this as a gift for my mother because everything she needs she already has, or so she thought. She uses this at least once a day and loves it. Definitely recommend this item!Good quality. Easy to use. Would purchase againHave only used once for gravy but it worked greatPlay Video
This is the best thing ever. I made homemade cranberry sauce first and this is the roux I made for gumbo. I dont know how i lived without it.
You put it in pot and turn on and I was able to do others stuff but I kept checking on it . My roux and cranberry sauce was perfect
This is a 10 starr reviewPlay Video
The Uutensil Pan Stirrer

the ultimate kitchen companion designed to make your cooking experience effortless and efficient. Here's why you need it:

1. Hands-Free Cooking: The Uutensil Pan Stirrer automates the stirring process, allowing you to focus on other tasks while it evenly stirs your dishes.
2. Consistent Results: With its three-speed settings, it ensures your sauces, soups, and stews are stirred consistently, preventing burning and sticking.
3. Versatile Design: Suitable for a variety of cookware, it's perfect for home chefs who love experimenting with different recipes.
4. Easy to Use and Clean: Its user-friendly design makes it simple to operate, and it's dishwasher safe, ensuring hassle-free cleanup.

Transform your cooking routine with the Uutensil Pan Stirrer, and enjoy perfectly stirred meals with minimal effort.So easy to use and works perfectly! I wish I had bought it months ago when I first saw it. No more standing over the pot stirring, WIN!This thing is awesome. When making a milk, based cream sauce, this kept it from burning while it was heating up to a boil. I will never be without one again.Works good even on cast-iron
reviews_1s:
So the thing mostly just vibrates in place. It kinda works in water but not very well and anything with more resistance than water is a struggle. Not a good purchase. Arrived late even though I paid a little extra for shipping. I regret buying this. Might return it or just trash it. Haven't decided yet.The product is useless! It leaves the middle of whatever you are making un stirred. That means the bottom of the center gets burned. It's a useless product! If there is one with a rotating leg in the middle I would buy it. I just received it. Do...Put brand new batteries in it, double and triple checked that they were all facing the right ways, and it didn't even light up. I also bought it when I was moving so by the time I unpacked it to try I was past the return date. Please don't buy thisThe product arrived in an open box and was obviously used for several weeks/months before it got to me. The product was the wrong color inside and looked/smelled like it had a previous owner, despite purchasing it brand new.

To top things off, it had no packaging, no instructions, and DIDN'T EVEN WORK!I saw this on a tik tok video and thought it would be great for my parents. I got it as a gift for them for christmas and well not long after opening we were disappointed. My dad used it for his gravy to free a hand up, and well one of the legs melted making it fall over and not spin like it should. If you're going to make a product for the stove, it shouldn't be made of a plastic that can melt. Not happy with this purchase and very disappointed. Do not recommend buying it just save your money and look for something elseThis does not move like demonstrated… in fact, it didn’t move20 seconds after first use and the legs melted. Was just cooking potato soup on a "5" on our stovetop. Stuck it in the pot, turned it on, and it nearly fell over. Melted ridiculously fast.

Also be aware that it doesn't tell you which direction the batteries go in. No marks or indicators. Nothing in the directions. Took me 20 minutes fiddling with them before I figured out how they went.

Anyway, this is hot garbage, don't buy.Should have read reviews first. It comes in for about 2to 3 seconds then shuts off. Bought this as a gift for my husband and he didn’t use it until after the return date. Complete waste of money. Do not buy!!!!!This thing would be nice if it could withstand a higher temperature. Unfortunately there's not much food that you need to sit and continuously stir so that it won't burn it burns at 257° f.This mostly just stays in place and if the eggs are starting to cook it's not even strong enough to move it around. Total waste of money.
